design_approach: Premium dental website with professional medical color palette, sophisticated typography (Playfair Display + Inter), and conversion-optimized layout showcasing 4.9-star Google rating
key_features: Sticky header with prominent phone number
Hero section highlighting 4.9-star rating with 392 reviews
6 comprehensive dental service cards with suggested placeholders
Social proof section featuring Google rating prominently
Contact section with booking form and map placeholder
Professional color scheme optimized for dental practice
conversion_elements: Prominent Google rating display for trust
Clear service descriptions with 'Learn More' links
